name: MiniMax-M2.5
_comment_arch: Standard GQA attention (n_kv=8) with no MLA compression. attn_type_list is all 1s → uniform full attention every layer.
_comment_k_active: shared_intermediate_size=0 → no shared expert. k_active=num_experts_per_tok=8 routed-only.
_comment_I_moe: intermediate_size=1536 in config refers to the dense FFN size which equals shared_expert_intermediate_size; expert FFN intermediate matches at 1536.
_comment_caveats: MTP (num_mtp_modules=3) head weights not added to T_theta — minor under-count on per-device parameter footprint.
